note: INT-2 — committed enumeration of the team presets a static Pages host cannot list at runtime. team-presets.js fetches this to build the picker; team-manifest.test.mjs pins every entry against the files on disk (id → www/presets/team/<id>.json, runKey → that file's runs). label is the SHORT chip label (the preset file's own `label` is the long descriptor). default marks the one-tap landing preset.
